## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss SEO strategies, client onboarding, and the Managing Editor role at growthx.ai with potential hire Joanna Kaminska.](https://fathom.video/share/bmAdYcntabAsUUtDDPd8KSnB-wz9iG_1?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX's SEO approach aligns with industry standards, focusing on organic pipeline growth and competitor analysis](https://fathom.video/share/bmAdYcntabAsUUtDDPd8KSnB-wz9iG_1?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [The company is rapidly scaling, standardizing processes, and emphasizing quality in client relationships](https://fathom.video/share/bmAdYcntabAsUUtDDPd8KSnB-wz9iG_1?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [Managing Editors typically handle 3-5 clients, with a focus on building trust and iterating strategies](https://fathom.video/share/bmAdYcntabAsUUtDDPd8KSnB-wz9iG_1?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [GrowthX prioritizes thorough onboarding and gradual ramping up for new hires, especially in customer-facing roles](https://fathom.video/share/bmAdYcntabAsUUtDDPd8KSnB-wz9iG_1?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)

## Topics

### SEO Strategy and Reporting

  - [Focus on organic pipeline growth and data requests over traffic](https://fathom.video/share/bmAdYcntabAsUUtDDPd8KSnB-wz9iG_1?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Macro analysis: competitor strength, market strategies](https://fathom.video/share/bmAdYcntabAsUUtDDPd8KSnB-wz9iG_1?tab=summary&timestamp=36.0)
  - [Micro analysis: customer pain points, buying decisions, alternatives](https://fathom.video/share/bmAdYcntabAsUUtDDPd8KSnB-wz9iG_1?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Use of tools like Ahrefs or SEMrush for keyword gap analysis](https://fathom.video/share/bmAdYcntabAsUUtDDPd8KSnB-wz9iG_1?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)
  - [Strategy document includes goals, challenges, opportunities, and focused tactics](https://fathom.video/share/bmAdYcntabAsUUtDDPd8KSnB-wz9iG_1?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Weekly reports with short-term goals, using templates in GSE or Looker](https://fathom.video/share/bmAdYcntabAsUUtDDPd8KSnB-wz9iG_1?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)

### Client Onboarding and Relationship Management

  - [Kickoff call with managing director/editor to present initial research](https://fathom.video/share/bmAdYcntabAsUUtDDPd8KSnB-wz9iG_1?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
  - [Weekly recurring calls to action strategy](https://fathom.video/share/bmAdYcntabAsUUtDDPd8KSnB-wz9iG_1?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
  - [First 3 months: focus on early signals, iterating strategy, and pivoting if needed](https://fathom.video/share/bmAdYcntabAsUUtDDPd8KSnB-wz9iG_1?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - ["Calibration articles" to fine-tune content to client's voice and style](https://fathom.video/share/bmAdYcntabAsUUtDDPd8KSnB-wz9iG_1?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [Building trust crucial for smaller teams to share proprietary data](https://fathom.video/share/bmAdYcntabAsUUtDDPd8KSnB-wz9iG_1?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)

### Managing Editor Role and Onboarding

  - [First 3 weeks: educational tutorials, test exercises, shadowing](https://fathom.video/share/bmAdYcntabAsUUtDDPd8KSnB-wz9iG_1?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
  - [Gradual easing into client relationships over 12 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/bmAdYcntabAsUUtDDPd8KSnB-wz9iG_1?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
  - [Managing editors typically handle 3-5 clients](https://fathom.video/share/bmAdYcntabAsUUtDDPd8KSnB-wz9iG_1?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
  - [Senior managing editors may take on higher volume](https://fathom.video/share/bmAdYcntabAsUUtDDPd8KSnB-wz9iG_1?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [Company prioritizes quality and prevents overwhelm](https://fathom.video/share/bmAdYcntabAsUUtDDPd8KSnB-wz9iG_1?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

### Company Culture and Growth

  - [Rapid hiring and scaling (3x growth recently)](https://fathom.video/share/bmAdYcntabAsUUtDDPd8KSnB-wz9iG_1?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
  - [Collaborative environment with open communication](https://fathom.video/share/bmAdYcntabAsUUtDDPd8KSnB-wz9iG_1?tab=summary&timestamp=1318.0)
  - [Focus on retention for both employees and clients](https://fathom.video/share/bmAdYcntabAsUUtDDPd8KSnB-wz9iG_1?tab=summary&timestamp=1357.0)
  - [Venture-backed, allowing for quality focus and manageable workloads](https://fathom.video/share/bmAdYcntabAsUUtDDPd8KSnB-wz9iG_1?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Maria or Bridget (Chief of Staff) to reach out regarding next steps in the hiring process](https://fathom.video/share/bmAdYcntabAsUUtDDPd8KSnB-wz9iG_1?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)
  - [Joanna to potentially reach out to Vivek (Senior Managing Editor) for role-specific questions](https://fathom.video/share/bmAdYcntabAsUUtDDPd8KSnB-wz9iG_1?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)
  - [Joanna to consider sending follow-up questions via email if needed](https://fathom.video/share/bmAdYcntabAsUUtDDPd8KSnB-wz9iG_1?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)
